description.value:
howing off isn't just something you do, it's part of who you are. You can use Performance to [[/act demoralize skill=performance]], [[/act lie skill=performance]], or [[/act make-an-impression skill=performance]]. If you've just done something impressive—such as rolling a critical success on an attack, save, or check—you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Performance checks for 1 minute, as the memory of your impressive feat hangs in the air. The GM has final say on if an action was impressive enough to merit this bonus.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.Effect: Show-Off]
